arts.ttl: Saturday's Premier League predictions including Newcastle vs. Man City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Newcastle United vs. Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City confirm six captains for season after 'tight' player vote
arts.sum: Manchester City have expanded their leadership group after a 'tight' vote by the players at the end of the transfer window

arts.ttl: Isak decision and Osula chance as Newcastle United squad revealed for Man City test
arts.sum: Jacob Murphy and Miguel Almiron are also attacking options should Isak be ruled out, while Tino Livramento and Lewis Hall will be hoping for a recall after missing out to Kieran Trippier and Lloyd Kelly at Fulham. Isak has not trainined this week, but he has not been ruled out of today's game, with a late decision to be made on his inclusion.

arts.ttl: Fuming Man City fan Arsenal flames - what happens next will decide title
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola did not hold back in his assertion of Arsenal and Mikel Arteta, stoking the Premier League rivalry and sending a clear message

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Man City TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola must do without Kevin De Bruyne, Rodri and Nathan Ake but has Premier League leading goalscorer Erling Haaland available after he escaped FA punishment for his reaction to City's late goal against Arsenal last weekend. St James' Park will be rocking at lunchtime as Premier League champions Manchester City provide the opposition for today's big showdown.

arts.ttl: Latest Newcastle injury news for Man City amid Alexander Isak update as Anthony Gordon plan hatched
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to St James' Park to take on Newcastle United on Saturday (12:30pm kick-off)

arts.ttl: Rodri, De Bruyne, Ake - Latest Man City injury news ahead of Newcastle United clash
arts.sum: The latest injury ahead of Manchester City's Premier League away fixture with Newcastle United on Saturday lunchtime

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta makes Pep Guardiola admission as Man City row rumbles on
arts.sum: David Raya is a major doubt for Arsenal's Premier League game against Leicester City on Saturday afternoon with Mikel Arteta still fielding questions about last weekend's draw against Manchester City

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Newcastle
arts.sum: After two games in the space of three days, drawing with title rivals Arsenal before beating Watford in the Carabao Cup, Pep Guardiola has some more squad rotation to do and, to complicate matters even further, is now without midfield star Rodri for the rest of the season . CB: Ruben Dias - One of many players given a rest on Tuesday, Dias should return to City's starting lineup as their primary leader in defence.
